params.group_countries_info: 2026 World Cup Group A: Mexico, Poland, Saudi Arabia, Argentina — North American host opener group
2026 World Cup Group B: Spain, Cabo Verde, Saudi Arabia, Uruguay — La Roja's defending Euro champions lead
2026 World Cup Group C: Brazil, Senegal, Iran, Australia — Brazil's Selecao chase the sixth star
2026 World Cup Group D: France, Cameroon, Croatia, USA — Les Bleus alongside the host USA
2026 World Cup Group E: Germany, Morocco, Japan, Costa Rica — Die Mannschaft seeks redemption
2026 World Cup Group F: England, Wales, Belgium, Tunisia — Three Lions chasing first title since 1966

params.team_mbti_info: Brazil National Football Team — ESFP (The Entertainer) — flair, samba style, joyous attacking football
Argentina National Football Team — ESTJ (The Executive) — clinical, disciplined, ruthless winners
Spain National Football Team — INTP (The Logician) — tiki-taka possession, geometric passing patterns, intellectual football
England National Football Team — ISTJ (The Logistician) — traditional structure, hardworking, classic 4-4-2 discipline

params.city_list_info: Top walkable European capitals: Copenhagen Denmark, Amsterdam Netherlands, Paris France, Zurich Switzerland — pedestrian-first urban design across Europe
Most walkable Asian metropolises: Tokyo Japan, Singapore, Seoul Korea, Hong Kong China — dense urban cores with world-class transit
Most walkable American cities: New York City, San Francisco, Boston, Chicago — North American urban walkability leaders
